C0300A_RPT_CRCT_YR_CD Temporal Orientation: Able to report correct year Indicates the patient's ability to report the correct year. 0. Missed by > 5 years or no answer 
1. Missed by 2-5 years 
2. Missed by 1 year 
3. Correct CHAR 1 x
